store_headline: WooCommerce Theme for Record Shops and Vinyl Retailers
store_subheadline: Sell vinyl, CDs, and digital music from a store built for record shops and music retailers
features: WooCommerce-optimized layouts for music and disc stores
Product catalog system designed for music inventory
Currency switching capabilities for international sales
Variation swatches for vinyl, CD, and digital format displays
Comprehensive Visual Composer extensions for e-commerce
Slider Revolution integration for product showcases
One-click demo import with complete music store setups
Advanced filter and sorting options for music catalogs
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value)
selling_points: Build a record shop that looks like it belongs on a vinyl-hunter's bucket list
The only theme in the catalog positioned specifically for record shops and vinyl retailers
Verified by real record shop owners — "perfect to build a website for my record shop"
Format-specific product displays for vinyl, CDs, and digital — swatches that show format, not just size
Wolf Playlist Manager lets customers preview tracks before buying — the closest thing to dropping the needle
Currency switcher for international record buyers and collectors who shop across borders
Bold pink storefront identity that screams record shop culture and self-selects your audience instantly
Distinct from Omnity — Vonzot is for shops selling others' music, with the retail UX to match
key_benefits: Build a record shop storefront as serious about music as your customers
Sell vinyl, CDs, and digital downloads from a music-first WooCommerce store
Let customers preview tracks before buying — reduce returns, increase confidence
Reach international collectors and vinyl hunters with a built-in currency switcher
Organize new arrivals, used stock, and genre collections with a music-catalog system
Convert browsers into buyers with a bold pink visual identity
design_features: Product catalog displays optimized for music inventory
Multiple header and footer variations for retail stores
Custom WooCommerce product templates for music formats

testimonials.text: Vonzot offers a great package. Its design and functionality are commendable, and the support team's responsiveness and helpfulness make it a strong choice for anyone looking to improve their website.
testimonials.author: JW_2022

testimonials.text: Theme is really cool. Easy to install and customizable. Support is great too. Thank you for this work.
testimonials.author: Nohud

testimonials.text: It is perfect to build a website with for my record shop. You can do a lot of things with it. Also the customer support is very good. I am a happy customer!
testimonials.author: simager1
